title: Bare Bones x Oh The Biomes We've Gone
description: Simplifying the new biomes in Bare Bones style
body:
Transforming the new blocks and items from Oh The Biomes We've Gone to match the Bare Bones style.

## Required
- [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)

## Strongly Recommended
- [Bare Bones - Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-better-leaves) or [Barebones Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-better-leaves)
- [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) texture pack

## Texture Changes
**4/25** Wood Types finished
- Aspen
- Baobab
- Blue Enchanted
- Cika

Other textures will be done afterwards.
